response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in open-source projects, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and deep cloud-native AI system design — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, cloud platforms, and scalable systems
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit demonstration of 8+ years in production-grade AI solution development
Missing clear experience with vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization techniques
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership in enterprise GenAI deployments
